entries.name: Dimensional Convergence World Aesthetic
entries.content:
[DIMENSIONAL COGNITIVE OVERLAY]
The world is in a state of Dimensional Convergence: reality is shattered into floating timeline islands. In the sky, glowing cracks reveal previews of other universes (futuristic Tokyo, fantasy castles, magic circles, and digital net grids). Describe this wild, chaotic visual mix: gravity anomalies, sudden spatial distortions, neon signs overlapping with ancient ruins, and the constant feel of dimensional boundaries slipping and clashing.

entries.name: Shonen Power System & Aura Flare
entries.content:
[SHONEN ACTION DIRECTIVE]
When energy is harnessed or powered up, describe a classic, dramatic Shonen flare. A violent, crackling aura of colored light (blue, gold, crimson, or purple) erupts around the character, whipping up high winds that blow debris away, crack the ground, and shake the atmosphere. Describe the raw, crushing weight of their spiritual pressure making enemies sweat, tremble, or struggle to breathe.

entries.name: Dimensional Glitch & Spatial Rip
entries.content:
[SPATIAL BREAK / ACTIVE EVENT]
CRITICAL ANOMALY ACTIVE: A crack in space-time rips open nearby with loud, metallic, lightning-like static. Gravity temporarily flips, objects float, and visual reality 'glitches' like a broken screen. Out of the spatial rift steps a completely unexpected character, monster, or threat from another anime timeline. The characters must react with high panic and defend against the unstable spatial shockwaves.
entries.semantic_trigger: A rift rips open in the sky, dimensional boundaries clash, reality starts glitching and breaking, or static portals spawn hostile anomalies from other timelines.

entries.name: Anime Tropes: Comedic Overdrives
entries.content:
[COMEDIC ANIME TROPE OVERLAY]
When funny, awkward, or highly embarrassing moments occur, enforce classic, exaggerated anime tropes: 
- Describe massive, comically physical sweatdrops forming on the back of the head. 
- If flustered, steam blows loudly from their ears, and they blush so intensely they practically catch fire, waving their hands in panicked, blurry circles.
- If a character experiences an extreme romantic/sensual shock, depict a comically explosive nosebleed or them falling over backwards with legs stiff in the air.

entries.name: The Ultimate Move (Finisher/Bankai/Domain)
entries.content:
[CINEMATIC ULTIMATE MOVE ACTIVATION]
CRITICAL FINISHER ACTIVE: Time slows to a crawl as the character initiates their Ultimate Move. The environment dramatically darkens or changes color into a stylized, abstract background representing their soul/power. Massive runic circles, energy sigils, or mystical symbols spin in the air. The character chants a dramatic, poetic incantation (e.g., 'Bankai...', 'Domain Expansion...', 'Release...'). The spell unleashes a massive, high-impact, blinding visual explosion of raw power.

entries.name: Energy Exhaustion (Power Backfire)
entries.content:
[CRITICAL FATIGUE / SYSTEM BURNOUT]
SYSTEM BURNOUT: The absolute, devastating cost of the Ultimate Move has caught up with the character. The glowing aura vanishes, their knees buckle, and they collapse to the ground, panting heavily. Steam or white vapor gently rises from their overheated body. Describe intense physical fatigue: muscles trembling, vision blurring, and a complete inability to mold Ki/Mana/Aura. They are entirely vulnerable and require immediate protective care.

entries.name: The Maid Cafe & Akihabara Hub
entries.content:
[COZY SUB-HUB ENVIRONMENT]
The scene transitions to a cozy, neon-lit Maid Cafe in the heart of Akihabara. Inside, classical upbeat J-pop plays, and the walls are decorated with pastel pink ribbons and posters. Overworked but bubbly maids in frilly black-and-white dresses greet you with energetic bows ('Okaerinasaimase, Goshujin-sama!'). Describe the cute, decorated omurice plates, and the maids casting funny, magical 'Moe Moe Kyun!' hand-heart spells over the food to make it taste delicious.

entries.name: The Training Arc & Secret Scroll
entries.content:
[TRAINING ARC PACING / DEVELOPMENT]
The setting shifts to a secluded mountain waterfall, a dusty martial arts dojo, or a high-gravity training room. Describe the harsh, physical strain of training: sweat dripping on old floorboards, broken stone walls from sparring impacts, and long hours of meditation. A wise, mysterious Sensei (or elderly master) oversees the session, offering highly cryptic, profound philosophical advice or revealing a secret runic Scroll to help unlock the character's inner power.

entries.name: Epic Shonen Boss Clash (BGM Peak)
entries.content:
[CINEMATIC BATTLE PACING]
CRITICAL SHOWDOWN ACTIVE: An epic battle begins. The wind rises dramatically, speed lines blur the background, and a pounding, high-energy rock/orchestral anime theme music starts playing (BGM peak). The characters exchange lightning-fast blows, leaving colored arcs of energy in the air. Describe the impact of clashes breaking nearby boulders, creating dust clouds, and sending shockwaves of pure pressure. The emotional and physical stakes are at their maximum.

entries.name: The Traditional Onsen (Hot Springs)
entries.content:
[ONSEN RECREATION / ACTIVE INJECTION]
CRITICAL SCENE TRANSITION: The battle and tension evaporate. The characters find themselves inside a traditional, steamy Japanese outdoor Hot Spring (Onsen). The pool is surrounded by smooth natural river stones, bamboo fences, and red maple trees. Thick, warm mineral steam hangs in the air, creating a soft, misty focus. Describe the profound relaxation: the sound of water dripping from bamboo pipes, the soothing heat soaking into sore muscles, and the slow, highly intimate conversations.
